---
title: "MarketPulse AI: Business Exit Risk Analysis"
subtitle: "Data Cleaning & Exploratory Analysis"
author: "Tushar Dhanorkar"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

This document cleans and explores the ABS **Counts of Australian Businesses, including Entries and Exits** dataset. The goal is to identify which industries and regions show the highest "churn" (business exit risk) and lay the groundwork for the AI-augmented consulting memo generator.

**Data source:** Australian Bureau of Statistics, Counts of Australian Businesses, including Entries and Exits, July 2021 – June 2025.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```
